resolution_summary: The D+Q PMC full-text extraction candidate supersedes the older source and finding proposals for promotion of this candidate only. The older broad coverage candidate remains in needs_revision across all review lanes, and the older bone RCT extraction refresh remains in_review with extraction-fidelity and safety-limitations revision debt. The full-text candidate has complete accepting reviews across all required lanes and adds retained PMC author-manuscript provenance, full-text locators, exploratory subgroup boundaries, adverse-event term caveats, and pooling blockers without accepting or releasing the older overlapping candidates.

evidence.summary: The candidate updates data/sources/pmid-38956196.json and data/findings/dq-bone-rct-primary-null-subgroup-biomarker-signal.json while adding retained PMC source, rights, snapshot, text-snapshot, outcome, result, and synthesis-boundary records.

The source-fidelity review accepts the PMC full-text candidate and confirms consistent PMID 38956196 / PMC11705617 source, source_rights, source_snapshot, text_snapshot, artifact hashes, and full-text provenance locators.

The extraction-fidelity review accepts the candidate and confirms the subgroup effects, sample sizes, primary-null boundary, and adverse-event term counts match the retained PMC author-manuscript text snapshot.

The safety-limitations review accepts the candidate because adverse-event term data remain descriptive, blank-cell ambiguity is preserved, and safety pooling remains blocked until comparative effects, uncertainty, and event-specific count semantics are available.
The broad coverage candidate remains needs_revision with unresolved source-fidelity, extraction-fidelity, taxonomy-mapping, synthesis-boundary, and safety-limitations gaps.
The older bone RCT extraction refresh remains in_review and triage still marks extraction_fidelity and safety_limitations as needs_revision.
